  "mnemonics": ["Extend Exception, Not Extend Trouble: Remember to extend the Exception class (or a subclass like RuntimeException) to create your own custom exception.", "Checked or Unchecked?   "keyPoints": ["To create a custom exception, extend the Exception class (for checked) or the RuntimeException class (for unchecked).", "Provide at least two constructors: a default no-argument constructor and one that takes a String error message.", "Throw your custom exception using the 'throw' keyword, just like any built-in exception."],
